species.name: Ascuero
species.creation: Exact Ascuero sprite: low stocky fire-and-earth quadruped, clay-rock back armor, fiery dorsal ridge, four legs and two exceptionally large pale digging foreclaws. Preserve the supplied identity, silhouette, colors, anatomy and pixel-art style.
species.idle: Alive combat idle: all four feet stay planted at fixed canvas coordinates; chest breathes, shoulders shift weight slightly, huge foreclaws flex, dorsal fire and quills flicker, head makes one alert micro-motion. Preserve anatomy and facing. No walking, translation, camera turn, scaling, squash/stretch, warping or extra limbs; seamless anchored loop.
species.melee: Explosive melee in place: hind legs brace, hips and shoulders coil, head lowers into a furious narrow-eyed snarl, then one massive forelimb drives a claw rake forward and down while support feet stay planted; dorsal fire lags and flares at impact. Preserve anatomy. No translation, turn, scaling, deformation or duplicate limbs. End holding peak impact, no recovery.
species.ranged: Aggressive dorsal-quill volley in place: all claws anchor, forequarters lower and rear armor lifts through natural hip articulation, heat travels along the dorsal ridge, eyes narrow and mouth snarls, then burning quills fire toward the opponent; shoulders recoil but feet stay fixed. Only projectiles travel. Preserve anatomy and facing. End holding peak release, no recovery.
